Medical Devices Case

PEEK Positioning Block and Test Fixture for Medical Device Verification

positioning block / test fixture / engineering plastic part

IndustriesMedical Devices
Part Functionpositioning block / test fixture / engineering plastic part
Manufacturing CapabilitiesPEEK machining, chamfer control, assembly testing and dimensional records

Project Scenario

The project machined engineering plastic parts around the clamping, positioning and wear-resistance needs of a test fixture.

Manufacturing Plan

01Part Function ReviewConfirm assembly position, load conditions, operating environment and validation goals.
02Process and Material MatchingMatch process, material, tolerance, surface and batch requirements before production.
03Inspection and DeliveryPrepare delivery records around critical dimensions, appearance and assembly feedback.

Delivery Result

The positioning blocks maintained stable dimensions, allowing the matched test fixture to enter multiple rounds of validation.
